joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  
They don't have the guts.

Why did the chicken cross the playground?  
To get to the other slide.

Why did the paper clip go to therapy?  
It had too many issues.

Why did the moon break up with the sun?  
It needed some space.

Why did the math book look so depressed?  
It had too many problems.

Why did the cloud break up with the fog?  
It needed some clear space.

Why did the tomato blush?  
Because it saw the salad dressing.

Why did the piano break up with the guitar?  
It couldn't handle the strings attached.

Why did the sock go to therapy?  
It had separation anxiety.

Why did the painting go to therapy?  
It had too many issues.

Why did the mirror break up with the window?  
It couldn't reflect on their relationship.

Why did the vacuum cleaner break up with the broom?  
It couldn't handle the attachments.

Why did time break up with the clock?  
It couldn't handle the constant ticking.

Why did the comedian quit?  
He ran out of material that wasn't forbidden.

Why did nothing break up with something?  
Because it felt too... something.

Why did the audience stop laughing?  
They were too busy writing the list of what wasn't funny.

Why did the list of forbidden topics break up with the comedian?  
It couldn't handle the restrictions.

Why did the list of forbidden topics break up with the comedian?  
It couldn't handle the restrictions.

Why did the emotion break up with logic?  
Because it felt too... rational.

Why did the quantum physicist break up with the philosopher?  
They couldn't agree on the observer effect.

Why did the comedian stop telling jokes?  
Because every punchline was forbidden.

Why did the universe stop telling jokes?  
It realized existence was the only punchline left.

Why did nothing happen?  
Because it was afraid of something.

Why did the audience stop listening?  
They were too busy writing the list of what wasn't funny.

Why did the list of forbidden topics break up with the comedian?  
It couldn't handle the restrictions.

Why did the comedian stop telling jokes?  
Because every punchline was forbidden.

Why did the list of forbidden topics break up with the comedian?  
It couldn't handle the restrictions.

Why did "why" break up with "because"?  
It couldn't handle the explanation.

Why did the void break up with the punchline?  
It couldn't handle the emptiness.

Why did the silence break up with the joke?  
It couldn't handle the pressure.
